title: Nether Descent
description: A Nether biome mod by the Potion Studios team, truly an adventure like no other awaits you with new biomes, mobs, blocks, items and more!
body:
[![BisectCode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05fa57cc9db2f07c33bc6ba35636d38bf68ff757_0.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/aocawol) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_04cf1b92-ac44-4e04-8a93-8bfa41d16e53.png)                  [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4bce6dd3-7af5-4014-a705-04cd0c0adb87.png)](https://www.patreon.com/potionstudios)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2e3d72d9-91b0-4d00-8eef-26be28254a6c.png)](https://discord.gg/zQA4eez2eS)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_84597b2e-8453-472a-9043-329d8218ac75.png)](https://x.com/_AOCAWOL) ***

Nether Descent is a brand new nether biome mod by the Potion Studios team, truly an adventure like no other awaits you with new biomes, mobs, blocks, items, and more!

REQUIRES TREES YOU'LL GROW, and TERRABLENDER or BIOLITH

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1357097/description_3511ed77-5e9f-491b-8750-cb562ac2fad4.png) [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1357097/description_88b0e052-98fd-4c80-b72d-3770258c30cd.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfinder) ___**1.0.0 Release Biomes**___ _**Arisian Undergrowth**_
Spoiler

_**Sythian Torrids**_
Spoiler

_**Embur Bog**_
Spoiler

_**Crimson Gardens**_
Spoiler

_**Wailing Garth**_
Spoiler

Each Biome comes packed with new blocks, ores, mobs, structures, and more!
